general.title: General 7K practice search
general.reason_ja: 大きな偏りがまだ強く出ていないため、総合練習向けの7K譜面から確認できます。
general.reason_en: No single weakness is dominant yet, so general 7K practice maps are a good next step.

left_hand_weak.title: Left-hand density practice search
left_hand_weak.reason_ja: 左手ミス率が高いため、左手側の密度や独立性を練習しやすい譜面候補を探せます。
left_hand_weak.reason_en: Your left-hand miss rate is high, so these candidates focus on left-hand density and independence.

right_hand_weak.title: Right-hand density practice search
right_hand_weak.reason_ja: 右手ミス率が高いため、右手側の密度や独立性を練習しやすい譜面候補を探せます。
right_hand_weak.reason_en: Your right-hand miss rate is high, so these candidates focus on right-hand density and independence.

jack_weak.title: Jack control practice search
jack_weak.reason_ja: 押しすぎやTapミスが目立つため、ジャックや同一レーン連打の制御練習に向いています。
jack_weak.reason_en: Extra presses or tap misses stand out, so jack and same-lane control practice should help.

ln_weak.title: LN release practice search
ln_weak.reason_ja: LN関連ミスが多いため、LNの押し始め・保持・離し精度を鍛えやすい譜面候補です。
ln_weak.reason_en: LN-related mistakes are common, so these candidates help practice LN starts, holds, and releases.

stamina_weak.title: Stamina consistency practice search
stamina_weak.reason_ja: 後半のミスが多いため、長めの譜面や持久力・集中維持の練習に向いています。
stamina_weak.reason_en: Late-song mistakes are high, so longer stamina and consistency maps should help.

accuracy_weak.title: Timing accuracy practice search
accuracy_weak.reason_ja: 早押し・遅押しが多いため、精度重視でタイミングを整えやすい譜面候補です。
accuracy_weak.reason_en: Early/late presses are common, so accuracy-focused maps should help stabilize timing.
